title: The 10 Pittsburgh Sweets on Social
subtitle: Bakeries, pastry shops, ice cream, dessert
angle: which Pittsburgh dessert businesses are showing up online this spring, ranked by creator pickup. Who creators are filming and what those videos reveal.
intro:
Every quarter, Signal Pittsburgh tracks which local dessert and sweets businesses are generating real conversation online, not follower counts or ad spend, but the organic signal: creator videos, review volume, and the plays those posts accumulate without the business lifting a finger. This spring's list reveals a city where the most-watched shops are often the least active on their own accounts.

The standout case is Kyo Matcha in Squirrel Hill South, where 39 independent creators have driven 1.79 million plays on content the shop itself never made. Its own TikTok has stayed quiet through all of it. Page's in Arlington is a different kind of signal: 3,145 reviews and 14 TikTok creators posting, with no brand account to receive any of it. La Gourmandine Hazelwood built its ranking on 736,000 creator plays and a feed that has since gone dark.

What this quarter's data keeps returning to is the gap between earned attention and owned presence. Several of Pittsburgh's most-filmed dessert businesses have no strategy at all, and they're still winning. Whether that holds through summer is the question Issue 02 will answer.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Thirty-Nine Creators Are Handing Kyo Matcha 1.79 Million Plays. The Shop's Own TikTok Hasn't Answered.

featured_tiktok.author: andremelendez
featured_tiktok.caption: this matcha place deserves more hype👀 #matchalover #fluffiestmatcha #matchaspot

items.playbook_top_move: Close the review sentiment gap now. Sentiment sits 16 points below the family median; address portion consistency on soft serve and close-time enforcement before the next review cycle compounds the gap.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Second In Ice Cream, Built On 1.15 Million Plays It Doesn't Own.

featured_tiktok.author: morganchompz
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying Jeni’s spring ice cream flavor lineup! 🍦💐 Have you tried any of these? @Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams #icecream #dessert #newfood #foodreview #snacks

items.playbook_top_move: Open a Jeni's TikTok account now. Thirty-five creators posted 37-plus videos pulling 1.15 million plays this quarter; a verified account lets the business tag back, capture followers, and redirect that traffic.

items.name: Treat - Ice Cream and Liege Waffles
items.descriptor: Third In Ice Cream, Carried By 32 Creators. Its Own Feed Has Been Quiet For 200 Days.
items.playbook_top_move: Restart the Instagram feed, now. The account has not posted in 200 days despite a 7.65% engagement rate; one post per week would re-anchor an audience already proven to care.

items.name: Millie's Homemade Ice Cream
items.descriptor: Number One In Ice Cream, With 578,817 TikTok Plays Earned On Accounts That Aren't Millie's.

featured_tiktok.author: nonazgonenutz
featured_tiktok.caption: #Mandelaeffect #Dreyers #edys #wtf Messing with my ice-cream is a No NO

items.playbook_top_move: Open a TikTok account this week. Twenty-five creators have already built a 578,817-play library around Millie's; a branded account captures future search traffic none of that generates today.

items.name: La Gourmandine Hazelwood
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Pastry, Built On 736,000 Creator Plays. The Bakery's Own Feed Has Gone Quiet.
items.playbook_top_move: Break the 41-day Instagram silence now. Post at least twice a week to Instagram; the account has been dark since before the top TikTok pulled 459,100 plays.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: Number One In Pittsburgh Sweets, Carried By 3,145 Reviews. Fourteen TikTok Creators Are Posting, Where Page's Still Has No Account.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok account now. Fourteen creators have posted 177K plays this quarter to an audience Page's cannot follow back or convert; a basic account fixes that immediately.

items.name: La Gourmandine Lawrenceville
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bakeries, Carried By 1,294 Reviews. The Feed Has Gone Quiet.

featured_tiktok.author: mattdinguspgh
featured_tiktok.caption:
Welcome to 337 Fisk Street in Lawrenceville, Pittsburgh. This iconic 1900 residence spans nearly 4,000 square feet, blending historic soul with modern luxury. 

https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/337-Fisk-St-Pittsburgh-PA-15201/11514118_zpi

items.playbook_top_move: Restart Instagram before another week passes. The account has been dark for 41 days; one post per week featuring a named seasonal item closes the gap against the family median.

items.name: Waffallonia
items.descriptor: Number One In Pittsburgh Desserts On Reviews Alone. The Social Signal Has Gone Quiet.
items.playbook_top_move: Restart Instagram as a real account. Convert to a business profile, post at least once a week, the account currently has no bio, no recent posts, and no business classification
